title: Oracle Solaris Zone
description: Represents an Oracle Solaris Zone instance managed through the RAD zonemgr module, including its identity, brand type, lifecycle state, and auxiliary state information.

name.description: Unique zone name used as the primary identifier

brand.description: Zone brand type determining the virtualization model

id.description: Numeric zone ID assigned when the zone is running or ready. The global zone is always ID 0.

uuid.description: Universally unique identifier for the zone

state.description: Current lifecycle state of the zone

auxstate.description: Dynamic auxiliary state flags providing additional status information
